title: Vitax Buxus Feed, Suitable For Hedges & Containers, Extended Nitrogen Release, Promotes Healthy Growth: 1Kg Pouch
features: ESSENTIAL NUTRIENTS TO GREEN UP LEAF COLOUR: Buxus Feed provides the necessary nutrients to enhance the vibrant green colour of box plant leaves, ensuring a lush and healthy appearance.

EXTENDED NITROGEN RELEASE TO SUSTAIN GROWTH: This feed is formulated with an extended nitrogen release mechanism, which ensures that Buxus plants receive a steady supply of nitrogen over time, promoting consistent and vigorous growth throughout the growing season.

DENSE AND HEALTHY GROWTH: The balanced mix of nutrients in Vitax Buxus Feed encourages dense, compact foliage, making it ideal for creating well-defined hedges, topiaries, and other structured forms commonly desired in garden designs featuring box plants.

PREVENTS NUTRIENT DEFICIENCY AND BOX BLIGHT: Buxus Feed is specifically designed to address common problems faced by box plants, such as nutrient deficiencies and box blight, helping to maintain the health and vitality of your Buxus throughout the year.

VERSATILE APPLICATION FOR BOX PLANTS: Suitable for various planting and maintenance methods, Buxus Feed can be applied to the bottom of trenches before planting new Buxus or used as a top dressing for established plants, making it a versatile choice for gardeners.
